meaning: adj.脸上发红,发热的,兴奋的,狂热的,肺病的n.脸红,患肺结核
examples: It was a hectic disorganized weekend.
My life was very hectic but empty before I met him.
It seems to ease all the aches and pains of a hectic and tiring day.
Our schedules were pretty hectic and we were really looking forward to a break.
In hectic lives overflowing with demands for instant response, reverie is too often banished.
